name: Holiday Hash Brown Bake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Red and green bell pepper (diced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw potatoes if necessary and blot them gently between layers of paper towels.
2. Sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper.
3. Coat a 9-inch pie pan with vegetable oil spray.
4. Press potatoes into the bottom and up the sides of the pan; spray again with vegetable oil.
5. Bake at 425 degrees for 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
7. Combine ham, cheese, and bell pepper; spoon into potato shell.
8. Whisk together eggs, milk, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
9. Pour egg mixture over the ham mixture.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes or until set.
11. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
